questions.question: What does SWR stand for?
questions.reason: SWR means Standing Wave Ratio and indicates how well the antenna system is matched.

questions.question: Why are feeder cables usually kept as short as practical?

options.text: To reduce signal loss in the cable

questions.reason: Longer feeders generally have greater loss, so keeping them reasonably short helps preserve signal power.

questions.question: What is a key advantage of mounting a VHF/UHF antenna higher?
questions.reason: Higher antennas usually improve line-of-sight paths and coverage at VHF/UHF.
